notes:
v1.4.6 Update
- Added a Shop Price Currency option that converts shop prices into one selected currency for display, purchase, and sell, including GlitchSmith Library virtual currencies.
- Fixed Shop Directory titles so SF, Astra, and FRENZY character shops no longer show a stale subtitle from another theme.

announcement.title: 🛍️ Stylish Shop v1.4.6
announcement.content:
Stylish Shop v1.4.6 adds forced price currency and fixes a directory subtitle edge case.

  • Shop Settings now has a Shop Price Currency option. Native keeps item denominations; selecting one currency converts prices, purchases, and sell payouts into that currency.
  • Example: a PF2e item priced at 2 gp can show and pay as 20bc when bc is worth one silver.
  • SF, Astra, and FRENZY character shops no longer show an old subtitle in the Shop Directory after switching from a subtitle-supporting theme.
